name: game_opponent range year_offset fans out to one opponent per offset year (executed-result parity)
description: Seed player TEST-GO on team ZZA for base year 2023 (a 2023 REG gamelog joined to nfl_games), then ZZA week-18 games in each offset year: 2024 vs ZZB and 2025 vs ZZC. Run game_opponent with year=[2023] + year_offset=[1,2]. game_opponent renders via a plain main_select and legitimately fans out across the multi-year window, so the range path must NOT skip the source join (unlike correlated-aggregate columns); the offset-aware attach correlates the offset-expanded game year to the base-year team mapping via BETWEEN year+1 AND year+2. Proves the fanout yields two rows -- one opponent per offset year -- rather than collapsing to a single offset.
expected_query: with "player_year_teams" as materialized (select "pid", "year", (array_agg(nfl_team ORDER BY game_count DESC, nfl_team ASC))[1] as team from (select "player_gamelogs"."pid", "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs"."nfl_team", count(*) as "game_count" from "player_gamelogs" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "player_gamelogs"."esbid" where "nfl_games"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2023) and "player_gamelogs"."season_year" in (2023) group by "player_gamelogs"."pid", "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs"."nfl_team") as "player_year_team_counts" group by "pid", "year"), "tdfe4d173d657b4545303f50a5c6f3ed4" as (select "year", "week", v as nfl_team, h as game_opponent, true as game_is_home from "nfl_games" where "nfl_week_id" in ('2024_REG_WEEK_18', '2025_REG_WEEK_18') union select "year", "week", h as nfl_team, v as game_opponent, false as game_is_home from "nfl_games" where "nfl_week_id" in ('2024_REG_WEEK_18', '2025_REG_WEEK_18')) select "player"."pid", player.first_name, player.last_name, tdfe4d173d657b4545303f50a5c6f3ed4.game_opponent as game_opponent_0, tdfe4d173d657b4545303f50a5c6f3ed4.game_is_home as game_is_home_0, "player"."primary_position" from "player" left join "player_year_teams" on "player_year_teams"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "player_year_teams"."year" = 2023 left join "tdfe4d173d657b4545303f50a5c6f3ed4" on "tdfe4d173d657b4545303f50a5c6f3ed4"."nfl_team" = "player_year_teams"."team" and tdfe4d173d657b4545303f50a5c6f3ed4.year BETWEEN player_year_teams.year + 1 AND player_year_teams.year + 2 where player.primary_position IN ('ZZ') group by player.first_name, player.last_name, tdfe4d173d657b4545303f50a5c6f3ed4.game_opponent, tdfe4d173d657b4545303f50a5c6f3ed4.game_is_home, "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by "player"."pid" asc limit 500

seed: INSERT INTO player (pid, first_name, last_name, short_name, formatted_name, primary_position, secondary_position, date_of_birth, nfl_draft_year, current_nfl_team) VALUES ('TEST-GO-000904', 'Test', 'Go', 'T.Go', 'Test Go', 'ZZ', 'ZZ', '2000-01-01', 2020, 'ZZA')

INSERT INTO nfl_games (esbid, year, week, seas_type, v, h, date) VALUES (970202, 2025, 18, 'REG', 'ZZA', 'ZZC', '2026-01-04')
